## [00:00 - 00:14]

Okay, the buyer just said, I'm here for my girlfriend, I'm looking for her, not for me. Excellent, and your name, sir. John, John, I'm Grant. Now, what can I give you all the information on? If you're satisfied with it, then you can bring her back at a later date. Fair enough?
